title: MDN Web Docs
description: HTML, CSS aur JavaScript ke liye sabse best aur reliable documentation. Har web developer ka pehla stop hona chahiye yeh site.

title: The Odin Project
description: Ek free, open-source full-stack web development curriculum. Beginner se professional tak le jaata hai — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, React sab cover hota hai.

title: CSS Tricks
description: CSS ke baare mein sabse comprehensive resource. Flexbox, Grid, animations — sab kuch yahan milega with great examples.

title: JavaScript.info
description: Modern JavaScript ka sabse detailed aur beginner-friendly tutorial. Basics se advanced topics tak — closures, promises, async/await sab covered.

title: Roadmap.sh
description: Frontend, Backend, DevOps, aur bahut saare roles ke liye step-by-step learning roadmaps. Nahi pata kahan se shuru karein? Yahan aao.
